title: Declare a Slice
instruction: Declare a slice of strings containing go, python, and rust using a slice literal, then print the whole slice.

title: Append to a Slice
instruction: Start with a slice of 3 languages, append java using append, then print the new length with len().

title: Slice a Slice
instruction: From the slice [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], extract the middle three elements (2, 3, 4) using s[low:high] and print them.

title: Range to Sum a Slice
instruction: Use for range to sum all values in [1, 2, 3, 4, 5] and print the result (15).
hint: for _, v := range nums { sum += v }

title: 2D Slice
instruction: Create a 2x2 grid (slice of slices). Set the element at row 1, column 1 to 99, then print that element.
